# Review Exceptions

Known limitations that should NOT be flagged as issues in code reviews.
These are intentional gaps, not bugs.

Add an entry under the relevant section (or add a new section) when you find
yourself dismissing the same Claude reviewer comment more than once. The
Claude PR reviewer reads this file on every run and will skip flagging
anything documented here.
